branches.label: HAPPY
branches.draftBodyPreview:
Dear Auditor proof HAPPY-AUDITOR-PROOF-1775492682617,

Thank you so much for your message—it's wonderful to hear you're moving forward!

I'm happy to confirm the details for the Elite collection:

• **Booking retainer:** 30% to hold your December 6, 2026 date in Tuscany, as outlined in your contract.
• **Engagement session travel:** Included within 50 miles of Florence.

Once you're ready to proceed this week, I'll send over the contract and payment instructions. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any other questions—we're here to make this seamless.

Warmly,

[Studio Manager]
[Studio Name]
